source: USDA RMA Actuarial Data Master — Revenue Protection Final Planting Dates

source_legend.RMA: Both dates from official RMA CSV files
source_legend.RMA-corn-soy-interpolated: Corn from RMA CSV; soybean from same-zone neighbors in CSV
source_legend.RMA-corn-regional-soy: Corn from RMA CSV; soybean from known state-level RMA ADM pattern
source_legend.RMA-corn-est-soy: Corn from RMA CSV; soybean estimated corn+20 days — verify at source_url
